descriptions: Added `Config.Prison.frkn_prison` to configuration and implemented `frkn-prison` export logic in `EDITABLE.JailPlayer`
Added `Config.Billings.codemBillingV2` to configuration and integrated support for mBilling v2 (`codem-billingv2`) in `EDITABLE.CreateBilling`
Added `Config.Dispatch.Integration.frkn_police_dispatch` to configuration and implemented server-side event listeners for `frkn-police-job` dispatch alerts
